header.subtitle: Decentralized. Secure. Yours.
header.description: Create your vault and secure your crypto today — built for transparency and control.

finalHeader.title: Nothing more to explore. Let's start today

secureStorage.title: Secure Storage
secureStorage.desc: Your vault runs on immutable smart contracts. No custodians, no intermediaries — only verifiable on-chain security. Your assets stay 100% under your control.

easyManagement.title: Easy Management
easyManagement.desc: Control, manage, and view your assets with a clean and intuitive interface.

fastTransactions.title: Fast Transactions
fastTransactions.desc: Built on the Sepolia network for near-instant confirmations. Deposits and withdrawals settle in seconds, ensuring a smooth and responsive experience.

fullTransparency.title: Full Transparency
fullTransparency.desc: Monitor balances and activity in real time with data pulled directly from the blockchain. Full visibility into every action, whenever you need it.

step1.title: Connect your wallet
step1.desc: Use MetaMask or WalletConnect to get started instantly.

step2.title: Verify sepolia balance
step2.desc: It will be necessary to create your vault and make trades.

step3.title: Create a Vault
step3.desc: Set parameters and deploy your secure vault into the blockchain in minutes.

step4.title: Deposit & Track
step4.desc: Deposit tokens and monitor vault performance in real time.
